arts.ttl: Liverpool dominated but scoreline made it seem difficult - Slot
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot says his side "dominated the whole game" but the 3-2 scoreline made it "seem difficult" following their win over Southampton at St. Mary's Stadium.

arts.ttl: 'Everybody knows' - Dominik Szoboszlai sends clear Liverpool contract message to Mohamed Salah
arts.sum: Liverpool midfielder Dominik Szoboszlai discussed match-winner Mohamed Salah

arts.ttl: Salah not ruling Man City out of title race despite Liverpool lead
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is refusing to rule Manchester City out of the title race despite Liverpool’s lead at the top of the table. Salah scored twice as Liverpool won 3-2 at Southampton on Sunday to move eight points clear at the top of the Premier League. The Reds were forced to come from behind at […] The post Salah not ruling Man City out of title race despite Liverpool lead first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Liverpool player ratings: Salah stars in comeback win at Southampton
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah continued his flying form with two goals to help Liverpool come from behind to beat Premier League relegation battlers Southampton.

arts.ttl: Pearce: “remarkable athlete” reaches another impressive Liverpool milestone
arts.sum: Liverpool were 3-2 winners over Southampton on Sunday afternoon and the Reds can thank Mohamed Salah for helping them return to Anfield with all three points. Arne Slot’s men came into the match at St Mary’s knowing that a win would see eight points put between themselves and Man City ahead of the two clubs […] The post Pearce: “remarkable athlete” reaches another impressive Liverpool milestone appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 'An asteroid strike' - National media react as Man City nightmare comes to Liverpool
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news and gossip as the Reds continue in their quest to beat Manchester City and Arsenal in the Premier League title race

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher makes new FSG demand after Mohamed Salah sends Liverpool eight points clear
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah scored twice as the Reds came from 2-1 down to beat Southampton 3-2 and extend their lead at the top of the Premier League table

arts.ttl: Salah goals help Liverpool rally past Southampton
arts.sum: Premier League leaders Liverpool beat bottom side Southampton 3-2 on Sunday to build a sizeable eight-point lead over reigning champions Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Southampton 2-3 Liverpool: Player ratings as Salah bails league leaders out
arts.sum: Match report and player ratings from Liverpool's 3-2 victory over Southampton in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Liverpool increase title pressure on Man City with thrilling Southampton comeback
arts.sum: Southampton 2-3 Liverpool: Mohamed Salah struck twice as the Reds went eight points clear at the top
